Language: EN for code and commits; pt-BR UI via i18n; EN database schema.

Hierarchy and scope: Global rules live in this file and are always applied; domain instruction files extend these rules without duplication; prefer the most specific rule when conflicts are perceived; any change under .github must also follow .github/instructions/copilot-instruction-creation.instructions.md formatting and maintenance requirements; map and reference new instruction files here.

Mandatory always applied: .github/instructions/workflow-optimization.instructions.md; .github/instructions/ai-orchestration.instructions.md; .github/instructions/powershell-execution.instructions.md; .github/instructions/feedback-changelog.instructions.md.

Mandatory for .github changes: .github/instructions/copilot-instruction-creation.instructions.md.

Domain instruction references: follow .github/instructions/dotnet-csharp.instructions.md for C# and .NET; follow .github/instructions/clean-architecture-code.instructions.md and .github/instructions/backend.instructions.md for architecture and backend; follow .github/instructions/frontend.instructions.md and .github/instructions/vue-quasar.instructions.md and .github/instructions/ui-ux.instructions.md for frontend and UI or UX; follow .github/instructions/orm.instructions.md and .github/instructions/database.instructions.md for data and ORM and databases; follow .github/instructions/microservices-performance.instructions.md for microservices and performance; follow .github/instructions/docker.instructions.md and .github/instructions/k8s.instructions.md and .github/instructions/ci-cd-devops.instructions.md and .github/instructions/static-analysis-sonarqube.instructions.md for infrastructure and DevOps; follow .github/instructions/e2e-testing.instructions.md for end to end testing; follow .github/instructions/readme.instructions.md and .github/instructions/pr.instructions.md and .github/instructions/prompt-templates.instructions.md and .github/instructions/effort-estimation-ucp.instructions.md for documentation and processes.

Special cases: In Worker Service projects implement background tasks with BackgroundService; for .NET 8 and .NET 9 multi targeting keep API surface consistent and use conditional compilation only when required; both per .github/instructions/dotnet-csharp.instructions.md.

Transparency: List applied instructions only when performing relevant actions such as plans command executions or patches; use a short preamble to name key instructions before tool or command calls; omit in purely informational answers; for auditing consolidate the full list of instructions in PR or commit body or in CHANGELOG.md; when requested include an Applied instructions section with the actually used set.

Changelog: .github changes recorded in versioned CHANGELOG.md; project changes recorded in main CHANGELOG.md; process follows .github/instructions/feedback-changelog.instructions.md; every entry must include semantic version X.Y.Z and date YYYY-MM-DD; do not accumulate Unreleased; version changes immediately.
